product_attribute: Size=Break X2 with Wireless Microphones and Mic Stand
title: Great Sound, Great Times, and a Fraction of the Bar Tab
review_text:
I was looking for a karaoke machine that would not break the bank, and the Ikarao Break X2 delivered exactly what I needed. My friends and I normally head out to karaoke bars, but after a long week sometimes staying home and saving money is the smarter call. This machine makes that decision an easy one, bringing the full karaoke bar experience right into your living room. At first the price may seem steep, but when you factor in what you would spend on a night out, it pays for itself quickly.

The Ikarao Break X2 comes loaded with built in apps to choose from, though some may require subscriptions depending on the service. What I appreciated most is that it also supports SD cards and common karaoke formats, which is a lifesaver if your internet connection is unreliable or unavailable. The screen is decent for up close viewing, but connecting it to a TV via HDMI is where it really shines and makes reading lyrics effortless. The battery lasts for hours without needing a charge, and the sound quality is impressively powerful even at moderate volume levels.

The version I purchased came with two wireless microphones and a microphone stand, which genuinely elevates the whole experience. There have been occasional moments where the system becomes unresponsive and requires a restart, but nothing that required complex troubleshooting or caused any lasting issues. Overall the performance has been reliable enough that it has not put a damper on any of our get togethers. If you are looking for a fun and affordable way to bring karaoke night home, this machine is well worth considering.

title: Cool karaoke machine
review_text: We bought this to sing by and we were impressed! You can download any song to sing by and it comes with two microphones. It‘s has bluetooth reliability and it’s mobility makes it great to take it anywhere you want to go. It’s a cool karaoke machine!

product_attribute: Size=Break X2 with Wireless Microphones and Mic Stand
title: An excellent home karaoke machine
review_text: My friends and I had a wonderful time using this karaoke machine. The only issue we had was the tablet itself makes it difficult to type quickly and has a short delay when opening or switching apps. A physical keyboard would be helpful. We did love that we could mirror the lyrics to the television. Without that, we would probably be annoyed at having to use the small screen. The sound quality is good with no feedback from the microphones and excellent volume. Initially, we had it in a karaoke mode, but soon discovered that the reverb was annoying. However once the settings were adjusted, we sang the night away. It is very portable and having the microphones stored within the speaker is very convenient. Would recommend this for any party.

title: Great quality!
review_text: Great quality sound. Versatile and easy to use! All in one design with multiple interfaces to other audio or TV etc. We love it.

title: Impressive in every way - look, sound, ease of use and compact sturdy build.
review_text:
I was anxious to receive the unit after reading so much about it and watching the videos.
I‘m thoroughly impressed with the look, sturdy professional build, outstanding performance and ease of use. This will be equal parts fun and profitable for me.

Great overall investment!

product_attribute: Size=Break X2 with Wireless Microphones and Mic Stand
title: Machine broke after only four months from purchase date
review_text: This is the worst product of all, I purchased this in Oct-2025, only 4 months and the machine is already broken. It won’t turn on, it just died for no reason and it’s very hard to contact customer support!!!

title: Best Karaoke machine for your karaoke money!
review_text: I actually did a lot of research for choosing this one. I really think this machine offers the best quality that you can get for the money. It is right on the edge of a really good Home machine and a professional one. I actually considered starting a Karaoke small business using this machine!I had a really cheap one before and I decided to treat myself and upgrade when I was asked by a friend to host a fun karaoke party at her house for our mutual friends. The party was a big success, the machine was easy to use and had great sound. I highly recommend it!.

title: Ikarao Beat X1 two thumbs way uo!
review_text: I still have the Pioneer CLD-V720 Karaoke machine I bought for about $1K setup in my home and will likely still keep it. With that said, I have been waiting to buy a Karaoke machine in this century! :) If you been into Karaoke, Pioneer is the best when it all started, mics, sound and a huge library of music video to choose from. Without a doubt, the Ikarao Beat X1 is the best in the market IMHO currently! It doesn’t have the nice videos like Pioneer Karaoke, but everything is better ie. mics, easy setup, custom sound setup for the mics, portable, inputs for wired mics or plug in your guitar, sound quality, Bluetooth, battery operated and ability to Karaoke offline. Two of my adult kids play the electric guitar, I can‘t wait for them to plug in and play while karaoking. The price point currently at $550 from $700 retail, it is the best valuev model for your money! I’m really impressed with this machine, I am not easily impressed by other Karaoke machines since I have the best Pioneer Karaoke machine that my family still uses, but this one is a solid, well engineered machine. I even bought the travel case, mic and Karaoke stand at Ikarao.com because I expect to use at family events outside wherever we party!

title: Amazing Karaoke Machine
review_text: This karaoke machine is fantastic! It is so much fun with great sound quality and many features. The screen size is very nice and it comes with 2 microphones for two people to enjoy at once. I highly recommend it.

product_attribute: Size=Break X2 with Wireless Microphones and Mic Stand
title: Awesome karaoke machine!
review_text: Can’t wait to use this at a party! We bought this for our boys for Christmas! We’ve been playing with it and even my husband and I got in on the singing! Really good sound and compact enough to take anywhere! If you are wanting a karaoke machine, BUY THIS ONE!!!

title: I recommend!
review_text:
The perfect karaoke machine that I have found. It makes karaoke very convenient with the Karafun App. You can pretty much find all kinds of songs from the app, and you can adjust the backup singer and key level. The sound system is phenomenal. You can easily cast the screen to the TV with an HDMI cable.
If you are used to the screen-casting method of karaoke through YouTube, you can still do it. But it is not as convenient because there is no YouTube queue function through the system. You pretty much have to select a song right after singing one if you use YouTube for a better song pool.

title: Exceeding Expectations: ikarao Break X2
review_text: Our annual karaoke party was coming, and our regular hired DJ could not make it.  I bought the ikarao break X2 after reading many reviews, not just on Amazon, but in various reviews of karaoke machines.  When I received it, I was a little apprehensive based on its smaller size.  But I underestimated the size when it came to the sound it produced.  It was fantastic...I purchased two additional speakers with stands, and we had a very professional sounding experience.  I added a tv to read the words, and we used the screen on the break X2 to build our cue.  It was easy for anyone to add the songs to the queue, and we had a fantastic evening on the patio.

title: Be careful before dropping your money down
review_text: You can’t mirror your iPhone to the actual Ikarao screen. With as much money spent I can’t believe the only way I could use YouTube and see lyrics and such is by having internet. You would think this machine would allow you to connect your phone with cable port into the karaoke machine and whatever is seen on your phone could be seen on the screen, but nope.Huge disappointment. If you are expecting to have the option I speak of then think twice before ordering this karaoke machine.

title: No instructions
review_text: The machine itself is great but it comes with absolutely no instructions on how to use it.

title: The associated stand when available would be a useful addition
review_text: Quality product.

title: Ikarao Karaoke Machine
review_text: For such a small size karaoke machine, this one packs a lot of sound.  The bass is incredible. Top quality and easy to operate.  My friends want to purchase one after they saw this karaoke machine in operation.  Value for the money and microphone quality are superb.

title: WOW! Very honorable product support
review_text: WOW the customer service is great! We received a brand new X1 replacement today.The Ikarao karaoke product works really great, thank you!

title: Easy, great karaoke/ Bluetooth speaker
review_text: I absolutely love this little Karaoke machine! Soooo easy to use, set up was a breeze and we started singing that night! Love that it has its own screen… nice because you don’t have to give up your phone or put your tablet to work. I haven’t tried connecting to my TV, but thinking it’s probably just as easy as it was opening the box. The sound quality is great and the microphone’s clarity is really good. The sound controls make it nice when you need to make some singing sound better. The lighting effects are ok, but that may be because I haven’t completely figured that out quite yet. We have used this as a karaoke machine as well as a speaker. Sound quality is very good, especially packed in such a small speaker. Highly recommend! Great for parties and get togethers!

title: Great Customer Service
review_text: ikarao‘s customer service is top notch. Damaged our speaker almost a year ago and they provided THE BEST customer service.

title: What a fun machine!
review_text: It’s super fun for family and friends get together!

title: Bluetooth, the ikarao becomes a speaker only and lyrics will show on ipad.  hdmi-words show on both
review_text: Just received that amazing unit!  I just received that and so far it is working well and is living up to high standards.  Great sound, mics are good, Customer Service is amazing-I have had several questions and they have responded within 24 hr!  Absolutely buy again!

title: Singing Machine
review_text: The karaoke machine works well and the sound quality is good

title: Satisfied Buyer
review_text: Great All In One Karaoke machine!

title: Karaoke machine is great
review_text: We were thrilled to receive and use this all-in-one machine - clear integrated chargeable wireless mics, working KaraFun system, and loud booming sound.

title: Don’t buy
review_text: If you’re use to singing on quality equipment …don’t buy! The delay on this microphone throws you completely off when singing ! You have to come in early all through the song for your voice to match up with the music ! Not good at all

title: Amazing sound, ease of use, and overall quality!
review_text: LOVE LOVE LOVE this machine!  I bought this just in time for my birthday. I’ve had so much fun with it so far! The box it came in kept the equipment intact. Easy to setup out of the box, battery life is insane, Bluetooth connectivity is easy, the touchscreen is a very nice touch. Being able to adjust the mic sound is such a plus as well. I bought the one that comes with a stand, and that doesn’t disappoint either. Great quality and the value for what it’s worth is top notch.

title: Excelente volumen
review_text: Muy práctico ! Funciona muy bien ! Excelente volumen

title: very good i love it
review_text: i love it is awesome

title: Great all in one package
review_text: Great all in one package. The UI is slow but usable. I wish they had an app to read CDG files. Also make sure you get the proper charger for it.

title: Great
review_text: Great product. Exactly as described.
